author: Her

capabilities.description: Extract the text of a PDF file (native PDFKit, per-page markers). Scanned PDFs without a text layer return a note instead of text.

path.description: Absolute path, ~ path, or workspace-relative path of the PDF.

capabilities.title: 读取 PDF
capabilities.usageHint: 用户给了 PDF 或提到某个 PDF 的内容时用它取正文；扫描件没有文本层会明确说明。

capabilities.description: Merge multiple PDF files into one, saved under office-exports and revealed in Finder.

paths.description: Two or more PDF paths, merged in order.

capabilities.title: 合并 PDF
capabilities.usageHint: 合并多个 PDF 成一个文件时用；按 paths 顺序拼接页面。

capabilities.description: Extract the text of a .docx Word document (paragraphs and tables).
capabilities.title: 读取 Word
capabilities.usageHint: 读取 .docx 内容时用；老的 .doc 格式不支持，请让用户先转存为 .docx。

capabilities.description: Generate a .docx from markdown (# headings, - bullets, numbered lists, **bold**). Saved to office-exports.
capabilities.title: 生成 Word 文档
capabilities.usageHint: 用户要一份 Word/文档交付物时用；先把内容组织成 markdown 再调用。

capabilities.description: Read a .xlsx workbook: sheet names, row count, and the first rows as pipe-separated text.

sheet.description: Optional sheet name; defaults to the active sheet.

capabilities.title: 读取 Excel
capabilities.usageHint: 查看表格数据时用；先读默认工作表，需要其他 sheet 再带 sheet 参数。

capabilities.description: Create a .xlsx from a 2D rows array (first row as headers). Saved to office-exports.

rows.description: 2D array of cell values; first row should be headers.

capabilities.title: 生成 Excel
capabilities.usageHint: 用户要表格交付物（清单、对比、统计）时用；rows 第一行放表头。

capabilities.description: Generate a .pptx deck from a slides outline. Each slide: {title, bullets, notes?}. Optional deck title/subtitle add a cover slide. Saved to office-exports.

title.description: Optional deck title (adds a cover slide).

capabilities.title: 生成 PPT
capabilities.usageHint: 用户要演示文稿时用：先和用户对齐大纲，再把每页组织成 title+bullets 调用；备注放 notes。

description: Office document tools: read/merge PDF natively, and generate/read Word, Excel, PowerPoint files through a local Python sidecar (bootstrapped on first use).
name: Office 文档工具
systemPromptAddendum: 处理 PDF/Word/Excel/PPT 文件优先用 office.* 能力而不是 shell。生成类能力的产物保存在 workspace 的 office-exports/ 目录并自动在访达中显示；回复里给出完整路径。首次使用生成类能力会自动安装本地 Python 环境（约 1 分钟），提前告知用户。
